untranslatable_reason: This signal describes a market microstructure behavior (quote refresh cadence and time precedence maintenance) that cannot be translated into price/volume-based technical indicators. The core logic requires tracking quote placement timestamps, quote refresh intervals (quote_refresh_interval_seconds: 10), price improvement requirements (minimum_price_improvement_required_bps: 1), and order book positioning—none of which are available in the allowed indicator set. This is an order management strategy rather than a price-action trading signal.
translation_notes: Signal ID MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_6_1 is fundamentally about market microstructure and liquidity provision mechanics ('maintaining and refreshing quoted prices at regular intervals'). It requires real-time order management logic, quote tracking, and latency optimization rather than technical analysis. Cannot be expressed using OHLCV-derived indicators.
